query:
UPDATE tachyon_apps_compute.compute_apps SET
            name = ?, repository_url = ?,
            repository_owner = ?, repository_name = ?,
            default_branch = ?, framework = ?,
            deployment_target = ?,
            connection_id = ?, root_directory = ?,
            build_command = ?, install_command = ?,
            output_directory = ?, node_version = ?,
            status = ?, production_deployment_id = ?,
            d1_bindings = ?, updated_at = ?
            WHERE id = ?
